mapper.select: select tsug.group_name, tsug.app_id, tugl.id as link_id, tugl.valid_from, tugl.expire_on, tugl.create_time from t_sys_user_group tsug join t_user_group_link tugl on tsug.group_id = tugl.user_group_id and tugl.is_deleted = 0 ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}

select tsu.user_id, tsu.username, tsu.nickname, tugl.id as link_id, tugl.valid_from, tugl.expire_on, tugl.create_time, tugl.status, tugl.status from t_sys_user tsu join t_user_group_link tugl on tsu.user_id = tugl.user_id and tugl.is_deleted = 0 ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}

select tsug.group_id, tsug.group_name, case when tugl.user_id is not null then 1 else 0 end as disabled from t_sys_user_group tsug left join t_user_group_link tugl on tsug.group_id = tugl.user_group_id and tugl.user_id = #{userId} and tugl.is_deleted = 0 where tsug.app_id = #{appId} and tsug.is_deleted = 0

select tsu.user_id, tsu.username, tsu.nickname, case when tugl.user_group_id is not null then 1 else 0 end as disabled from t_sys_user tsu left join t_user_group_link tugl on tsu.user_id = tugl.user_id and tugl.is_deleted = 0 and tugl.user_group_id = #{userGroupId} where tsu.is_deleted = 0
